'''Scoryn''' was an outlaw and member of the security contingent onboard the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]''.

==Biography==
As a young woman, Scoryn and her family were abducted by [[Slavery/Legends|slavers]]. Alongside other slaves, she fought her way out of the slaver's palace. Her exploits impressed a crimelord, who offered her a position as head of his palace security force. Unfortunately, a minor mistake offended him, and the crimelord ordered her execution. Leading her security force in a mutiny, she wounded the crimelord and his courtiers, and destroyed a large part of his palace.

Now with a price on her head, Scoryn fled into the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], eventually settling on [[Kal'Shebbol/Legends|Kal'Shebbol]]. She worked as a guard for several merchant warehouses, but was worried that she had no means of transport in case a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] tracked her down.

When the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] liberated Kal'Shebbol, she signed onto the ''FarStar'' as a way to keep mobile. Her abilities made her a natural security officer, and Security Officer [[Gorak Khzam]] used her to keep order among the close-quartered crew. She was also used in ground-side combat operations and boarding actions.

==Appearance==
Once considered pretty, age and experience had left Scoryn weathered and rough. Her black hair was streaked with gray, and she often wore it in a tail or in braids.

==Personality and traits==
A bitter woman, Scoryn rarely smiled, hiding all emotion behind a steely gaze and stoic face. She expected order among the crew, and was loyal to Security Officer Khzam.
